title: Fluffy Midnight Craving Malaysian Yeast Stir-fry
description: A midnight crave-worthy fermented Malaysian dish featuring naan bread and whisked eggs in a whole30-friendly sauce.
instructions: Crush the naan bread into a bowl.
In another bowl, whisk the eggs thoroughly until frothy and creamy.
Add ginger paste, fish sauce, coconut cream, and sugar to the egg mixture. Mix well until fully incorporated.
Gently fold the whipped eggs into the crumbled naan bread.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, spreading evenly and flattening gently.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top and crispy at the bottom.
Let it cool before slicing and serving.
